description: All patterns for a given company

name.description: The i18n display name of the Wbs Segment.

position.description: Position of the Wbs Segment according to the Company Wbs Pattern.

segment_items_count.description: Number of items that belong to this segment

required.description: Whether this Wbs Segment is required.

delimiter.description: The delimiter between this Wbs Segment and the subsequent Wbs Segment.

project_can_modify_origin_project.description: Whether project-specific Segment Items are able to be added to a Project.

project_can_delete_origin_company.description: Whether Segment Items inherited from the company-level are able to be deleted from a Project.

structure.description: The Structure for this Wbs Segment.

wbs_pattern_id.description: ID of the associated WBS Pattern
